welcome.subject: Welcome to {company}!
welcome.body:
Hello {name},

Welcome to {company}! We are thrilled to have you on board.

Best regards,
The {company} Team

newsletter.subject: Monthly Newsletter from {company}
newsletter.body:
Dear {name},

Here is your monthly newsletter from {company}.

Stay tuned for more updates!

Best regards,
{company}

internship.subject: Internship Offer - {company}
internship.body:
Dear {name},

Congratulations! We are pleased to offer you an internship at {company}.

Please confirm your acceptance.

Best regards,
HR Team - {company}
